response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced software engineer with over 14 years in the industry, heavily utilizing TypeScript, Node.js, and React. He perfectly matches the niche requirement of AI agent development and possesses a stellar background in testing, cloud infrastructure, and architecture. Although he lacks explicit mentions of Nest.js and Kotlin, his deep knowledge of Java, TDD, and full-stack engineering makes him an outstanding candidate for this Senior Fullstack role.
strengths: Over 14 years of full-stack experience with deep expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, and React.
Direct recent experience developing AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators.
Exceptional testing background, including TDD practices, creating test libraries, and teaching testing courses.
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest, though his extensive testing and Node background mitigates this.
Lacks Kotlin and Python experience, which are listed as secondary or required languages.
Currently holds a Staff Engineer title and is a Founder, which may require alignment on expectations for a Senior IC role.
